title: Configuration + Fail-Fast Behaviors for Schema/Pack Selection

tasks.detail: Rename PacksEnabled->Enabled, PacksRequired->Required, PackRootPath->RootPath. Add CacheMode (MappingSetCacheMode enum, default InMemory). Remove DMS-978 TODO comment. Update XML docs.
tasks.design_decision: DD-2 (rename for design doc alignment), DD-3 (CacheMode only, defer capacity)

tasks.description: Bind options to appsettings.json and register validator in DI
tasks.detail: Add 'MappingPacks' section to appsettings.json with defaults. Change AddPostgresqlDatastore() signature to require IConfiguration parameter. Replace empty Configure lambda with configuration.GetSection('MappingPacks') binding. Update 3 call sites: WebApplicationBuilderExtensions.cs (pass webAppBuilder.Configuration), PostgresqlRuntimeMappingInitializationTests.cs line 204 (build empty config), line 1317 (pass existing configuration). Register IValidateOptions<MappingSetProviderOptions> validator singleton in WebApplicationBuilderExtensions. Add validation trigger in ReportInvalidConfiguration().
tasks.design_decision: DD-1 (MappingPacks section name), DD-4 (IValidateOptions pattern), DD-5 (single IConfiguration parameter, no overload)

tasks.detail: Implement IValidateOptions<MappingSetProviderOptions>. Validate: Required=true && Enabled=false -> Fail. CacheMode is defined enum value -> Fail. Follow existing validator pattern (ValidateOptionsResult.Success or .Fail).
tasks.design_decision: DD-4 (follow IValidateOptions pattern, only validate contradictory settings)

tasks.detail: Add IReadOnlyList<string> Diagnostics property. Add constructor overloads accepting diagnostics array. Keep existing constructors with Diagnostics defaulting to [message]. Follow DatabaseFingerprintValidationException pattern.
tasks.design_decision: DD-6 (follow DatabaseFingerprintValidationException pattern with string[] diagnostics, not enum)

tasks.description: Update MappingSetProvider with actionable diagnostics and logging
tasks.detail: Rename property references (Enabled, Required, RootPath). Update all throw sites with structured diagnostics arrays containing EffectiveSchemaHash, Dialect, RelationalMappingVersion, pack status, and suggested action. Add Warning logs before fail-fast throws. Add Information log after successful runtime compilation.
tasks.design_decision: DD-6 (diagnostics arrays), DD-7 (targeted structured logging at gaps)

tasks.detail: When catching MappingSetUnavailableException, pass ex.Diagnostics as the errors array and ex.Message as the detail field. No changes to FailureResponse factory needed.
tasks.design_decision: DD-6 (pass diagnostics through), DD-9 (no FailureResponse changes)

tasks.description: Update all consumers of renamed options properties
tasks.detail: Update PacksEnabled->Enabled, PacksRequired->Required, PackRootPath->RootPath in MappingSetProviderTests.cs and any other referencing files. Verify build succeeds.

tasks.description: Add structured logging to MappingSetCache for cache hits
tasks.detail: Add Debug log on cache hit in MappingSetCache or MappingSetProvider: 'Mapping set cache hit for {EffectiveSchemaHash}, {Dialect}'. Use LogSanitizer consistent with existing backend logging.
New test fixture MappingSetProviderOptionsValidatorTests. Tests: default options pass, Required=true + Enabled=false fails, valid combinations pass.

tasks.description: Unit tests: actionable diagnostics in MappingSetProvider exceptions
tasks.detail: Extend MappingSetProviderTests. Verify Diagnostics array populated for: pack required + not found, pack decode failure, no compiler registered, compilation failure. Each array contains EffectiveSchemaHash/Dialect/RelationalMappingVersion. Add multi-instance safety test (failure key A doesn't block key B).
Extend ResolveMappingSetMiddlewareTests. Verify 503 response body errors array contains diagnostic details from exception. Verify detail field contains exception message.
Run dotnet csharpier format on all changed .cs files. Build solution. Run unit tests for Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit and Core.Tests.Unit.
